# RRT

Sampling-based motion planning that incrementally grows a tree toward random states.

<div class="algorithm-meta">
  <span>Planning</span>
  <span>robotics, motion planning, sampling</span>
  <span>Mermaid</span>
</div>

## Flowchart

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Initialize tree at start state] --> B[Sample random state]
    B --> C[Find nearest tree node]
    C --> D[Steer toward sample]
    D --> E{Collision free?}
    E -- No --> B
    E -- Yes --> F[Add new node and edge]
    F --> G{Goal reached?}
    G -- No --> B
    G -- Yes --> H[Return path through tree]
```


## Notes

- RRT is effective in high-dimensional continuous spaces.
- Collision checking is usually the dominant practical cost.
